title.en: HR-WPAN Information Elements: Beamforming Pattern Estimation and Directional Peering
title.zh: HR-WPAN 信息元素：波束图样估计与定向对等通信

blocks.en: This is part 3 of 4 of our walk through Clause 6 (MAC frame formats) of IEEE Std 802.15.3-2016, the High-Rate Wireless Personal Area Network (HR-WPAN) standard. We are inside 6.4 (Information elements, or IEs) — the variable-length, tagged building blocks that DEVs (devices) and the PNC (piconet coordinator — the device that runs the network) stuff into beacons, commands, and data frames. This lesson covers six IEs (6.4.31 through 6.4.36) that almost all serve one job: configuring and reporting directional antenna beams for the high-rate millimetre-wave PHY (physical layer). When you steer a narrow beam, both ends must agree on exactly how the antenna array is shaped — that shared agreement is what these IEs carry.
blocks.zh: 这是我们讲解 IEEE Std 802.15.3-2016（高速率无线个域网，HR-WPAN）第 6 章（MAC 帧格式）系列的第 3 部分（共 4 部分）。本课聚焦于 6.4 节（信息元素，IE）——这是设备（DEV）与微微网协调器（PNC，运行整个网络的设备）塞进信标、命令帧和数据帧里的可变长度、带标签的构造块。本课覆盖六个 IE（6.4.31 至 6.4.36），它们几乎都服务于同一个目标：为高速率毫米波物理层（PHY）配置与上报定向天线波束。当你要把一束窄波束对准某个方向时，收发两端必须就天线阵列的精确形状达成一致——这些 IE 承载的正是这份共享的约定。

blocks.en: Two acronyms recur throughout this set. PET = Pattern Estimation and Tracking: the process of figuring out an antenna array's effective beam pattern (its per-element amplitudes and phases) and keeping it up to date as conditions change. HRS = High-Rate Sub-array (a beamforming concept tied to the high-rate PHY). AAS and SAS are the two antenna architectures: Adaptive Antenna System and Switched Antenna System. In an SAS the transmit and receive configurations are identical, which is why several of these IEs let you omit the RX half.
blocks.zh: 本组贯穿两个反复出现的缩写。PET = 图样估计与跟踪（Pattern Estimation and Tracking）：即估算出天线阵列的有效波束图样（各阵元的幅度与相位），并在环境变化时持续更新它。HRS = 高速率子阵列（High-Rate Sub-array，与高速率 PHY 绑定的一种波束成形概念）。AAS 与 SAS 是两种天线架构：自适应天线系统（Adaptive Antenna System）与开关天线系统（Switched Antenna System）。在 SAS 中收发配置完全相同，这正是这些 IE 中有几个允许省略接收（RX）一半的原因。

blocks.en: 6.4.31 Beam PET IE is the anchor of the group. Its Content field holds a 4-octet PET TX Configuration field and a 4-octet PET RX Configuration field (the RX half is omitted in the SAS case). Each configuration describes the array geometry: a Number of Antennas (z-axis) and Number of Antennas (x-axis) field — each set to one less than the actual count, sketching a two-dimensional linear array — plus a Beam Codebook ID for each axis (which precomputed beam set to use). Crucially it also carries an Amplitude Resolution and a Phase Resolution field. Each is coded as N, meaning there are 2^N possible discrete values, and N is limited to the range 0 to 4. These two numbers tell the receiver how finely the upcoming amplitude and phase reports are quantised.
blocks.zh: 6.4.31 Beam PET IE 是这组 IE 的锚点。其 Content 字段包含一个 4 字节的 PET TX Configuration 字段和一个 4 字节的 PET RX Configuration 字段（在 SAS 情况下省略 RX 一半）。每个配置描述了阵列几何结构：Number of Antennas（z 轴）与 Number of Antennas（x 轴）字段——各自设为实际数量减一，用以勾勒出一个二维线性阵列——再加上每个轴的 Beam Codebook ID（指明使用哪套预先计算好的波束集合）。尤为关键的是，它还携带 Amplitude Resolution（幅度分辨率）与 Phase Resolution（相位分辨率）字段。两者均以 N 编码，表示共有 2^N 个可能的离散值，且 N 被限定在 0 到 4 的范围内。这两个数字告诉接收方：接下来的幅度与相位上报被量化到多细的精度。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 460 120" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><text x="8" y="16" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11">Beam PET IE Content (Fig 6-117 / 6-118)</text><rect x="8" y="28" width="100" height="30"/><rect x="108" y="28" width="100" height="30"/><text x="58" y="47" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">PET TX Config (4 oct)</text><text x="158" y="47" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">PET RX Config (4 oct)</text><line x1="58" y1="58" x2="30" y2="78"/><line x1="58" y1="58" x2="430" y2="78"/><rect x="8" y="78" width="66" height="30"/><rect x="74" y="78" width="66" height="30"/><rect x="140" y="78" width="74" height="30"/><rect x="214" y="78" width="74" height="30"/><rect x="288" y="78" width="66" height="30"/><rect x="354" y="78" width="66" height="30"/><rect x="420" y="78" width="32" height="30"/><text x="41" y="96" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle">N ant z</text><text x="107" y="96" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle">N ant x</text><text x="177" y="96" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle">Codebook z</text><text x="251" y="96" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle">Codebook x</text><text x="321" y="96" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle">Amp res</text><text x="387" y="96" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle">Phase res</text><text x="436" y="96" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="8" text-anchor="middle">Rsvd</text></svg>

caption.en: The Beam PET IE (6.4.31): TX and RX configuration fields, each unpacking into antenna counts, codebook IDs, and the amplitude/phase resolution that govern every later PET report.
caption.zh: Beam PET IE（6.4.31）：TX 与 RX 配置字段，各自展开为天线数量、码本 ID，以及决定后续所有 PET 上报的幅度/相位分辨率。

blocks.en: 6.4.32 HRS Beam PET IE is the compact cousin for High-Rate Sub-array beamforming. Its Content field carries a 2-octet PET TX HRS Configuration field and a 2-octet PET RX HRS Configuration field (again, the RX half is omitted for SAS). Each HRS configuration is even simpler than the full Beam PET: it is just an HRS Beam Codebook ID for the z-axis and one for the x-axis. So where 6.4.31 describes a full array with its own resolution settings, 6.4.32 is a lightweight pointer that says 'use these two codebooks' for the high-rate sub-array path.
blocks.zh: 6.4.32 HRS Beam PET IE 是面向高速率子阵列（HRS）波束成形的精简版本。其 Content 字段携带一个 2 字节的 PET TX HRS Configuration 字段和一个 2 字节的 PET RX HRS Configuration 字段（同样，SAS 情况下省略 RX 一半）。每个 HRS 配置比完整的 Beam PET 还要简单：它只是 z 轴和 x 轴各自的 HRS Beam Codebook ID。因此，6.4.31 描述的是一个带有自身分辨率设置的完整阵列，而 6.4.32 则是一个轻量级指针，只是说一句“高速率子阵列路径请使用这两套码本”。

blocks.en: 6.4.33 PET Amplitude IE and 6.4.34 PET Phase IE are where the actual measured beam pattern travels. Both lay out one 4-bit field per antenna element, in the predefined element order, followed by a Reserved field that is present only when there is an odd number of elements (so the total ends on a byte boundary). In the PET Amplitude IE, each Element Amplitude is encoded relative to the strongest element: the value is one less than the numerator N of a fraction N/D, where D = 2^(Amplitude Resolution) comes straight from the Beam PET IE. In the PET Phase IE, each Element Phase is the numerator N of N/D where D = 2^(Phase Resolution); with a phase resolution of 4 you get 16 steps of 22.5 degrees each, spanning 0 to 342.5 degrees. This is the elegant link: 6.4.31 sets the resolution, and 6.4.33/6.4.34 fill in the numbers using exactly that scale.
blocks.zh: 6.4.33 PET Amplitude IE 与 6.4.34 PET Phase IE 才是实际测得的波束图样的载体。两者都按预定义的阵元顺序，为每个天线阵元排布一个 4 比特字段，其后跟一个 Reserved 字段——仅当阵元数为奇数时才存在（以使总长度落在字节边界上）。在 PET Amplitude IE 中，每个 Element Amplitude 相对于最强阵元编码：其值为分数 N/D 的分子 N 减一，其中 D = 2^(幅度分辨率) 直接来自 Beam PET IE。在 PET Phase IE 中，每个 Element Phase 是 N/D 的分子 N，其中 D = 2^(相位分辨率)；当相位分辨率为 4 时，可得 16 个步进、每步 22.5 度，覆盖 0 至 342.5 度。这正是其精妙的衔接：6.4.31 设定分辨率，而 6.4.33/6.4.34 就用这套刻度填入具体数值。

blocks.en:
flowchart LR
  A[Beam PET IE 6.4.31\nAmp res = N, Phase res = N] -->|sets scale D=2^N| B[PET Amplitude IE 6.4.33\nper-element amplitude]
  A -->|sets scale D=2^N| C[PET Phase IE 6.4.34\nper-element phase]
  B --> D[Reconstructed beam pattern]
  C --> D
blocks.zh:
flowchart LR
  A[Beam PET IE 6.4.31\n幅度分辨率=N, 相位分辨率=N] -->|设定刻度 D=2^N| B[PET Amplitude IE 6.4.33\n各阵元幅度]
  A -->|设定刻度 D=2^N| C[PET Phase IE 6.4.34\n各阵元相位]
  B --> D[重建出的波束图样]
  C --> D

blocks.en: 6.4.35 Sync Frame Frequency IE steps away from beam patterns to control timing. Its single Content octet packs a 5-bit Sync Frame Frequency field, a 1-bit Sync Frame Direction field, and 2 reserved bits. The PNC uses it to tell a DEV how many superframes (the periodic time structure of the piconet) should pass between two Sync frames, as defined in 6.3.6. Setting the field to zero is a request to stop sending Sync frames altogether. The Sync Frame Direction bit chooses omni-directional transmission (0) or directional transmission (1); when directional, the DEV cycles round-robin through its available beam directions so neighbours in every direction eventually hear the sync.
blocks.zh: 6.4.35 Sync Frame Frequency IE 从波束图样转向控制定时。其单字节 Content 打包了一个 5 比特的 Sync Frame Frequency 字段、一个 1 比特的 Sync Frame Direction 字段以及 2 个保留比特。PNC 用它来告诉某个 DEV：两个 Sync 帧之间应间隔多少个超帧（superframe，即微微网的周期性时间结构），具体见 6.3.6。将该字段置零即请求彻底停止发送 Sync 帧。Sync Frame Direction 比特用于选择全向发送（0）还是定向发送（1）；定向时，DEV 会以轮询（round-robin）方式遍历其各个可用波束方向，使得各个方向上的邻居最终都能收到同步信息。

blocks.en: 6.4.36 Directional Peer IE sets up peer-to-peer directional links. Its Content field is a 1-octet SrcID, a 1-octet DestID (both DEVIDs — the short addresses of the source and destination devices), a 1-octet Configuration field, and a 2-octet Allocated Superframes field. The directional communication happens in the regular CAP and/or regular S-CAP (Contention Access Period / Synchronous Contention Access Period — the contention windows of the superframe). Inside Configuration, a Request/Release bit set to one requests the directional link and zero releases it, and a Unidirectional/Bidirectional Allowance bit set to one means the link is one-way. Allocated Superframes then states how many superframes are reserved for that source-destination pair.
blocks.zh: 6.4.36 Directional Peer IE 用于建立点对点的定向链路。其 Content 字段包含一个 1 字节的 SrcID、一个 1 字节的 DestID（两者均为 DEVID，即源设备与目的设备的短地址）、一个 1 字节的 Configuration 字段，以及一个 2 字节的 Allocated Superframes 字段。定向通信发生在常规 CAP 和/或常规 S-CAP 中（竞争接入期 / 同步竞争接入期，即超帧中的竞争窗口）。在 Configuration 内部，Request/Release 比特置一表示请求建立定向链路、置零表示释放它；Unidirectional/Bidirectional Allowance 比特置一表示链路为单向。Allocated Superframes 则说明为该源—目的设备对预留了多少个超帧。

summary.en: Coverage map — exact clause numbers for all six IEs
summary.zh: 覆盖地图——六个 IE 的精确条款编号

blocks.en: All six covered units live in 6.4 (Information elements). 6.4.31 Beam PET IE — Content = PET TX/RX Configuration (4 octets each, Figs 6-117/6-118), carrying antenna counts per axis, beam codebook IDs, and Amplitude/Phase Resolution (each coded as N for 2^N values, range 0-4). 6.4.32 HRS Beam PET IE — Content = PET TX/RX HRS Configuration (2 octets each, Figs 6-119/6-120), just z-axis and x-axis HRS Beam Codebook IDs. 6.4.33 PET Amplitude IE — 4-bit Element Amplitude per element relative to the strongest, scale D = 2^(Amplitude Resolution) (Fig 6-121); Reserved present only for an odd element count. 6.4.34 PET Phase IE — 4-bit Element Phase per element, scale D = 2^(Phase Resolution), e.g. 16 steps of 22.5 degrees (Fig 6-122); Reserved on odd count. 6.4.35 Sync Frame Frequency IE — 5-bit frequency (superframes between Sync frames, 0 = stop), 1-bit direction (omni vs directional round-robin), per 6.3.6 (Fig 6-123). 6.4.36 Directional Peer IE — SrcID, DestID, Configuration (Request/Release bit, Unidirectional/Bidirectional Allowance bit), and Allocated Superframes for directional peer links in the regular CAP/S-CAP (Figs 6-124/6-125).
blocks.zh: 全部六个覆盖单元都位于 6.4 节（信息元素）。6.4.31 Beam PET IE——Content = PET TX/RX Configuration（各 4 字节，图 6-117/6-118），携带每轴天线数量、波束码本 ID 以及幅度/相位分辨率（各以 N 编码表示 2^N 个值，范围 0-4）。6.4.32 HRS Beam PET IE——Content = PET TX/RX HRS Configuration（各 2 字节，图 6-119/6-120），仅含 z 轴和 x 轴的 HRS Beam Codebook ID。6.4.33 PET Amplitude IE——每阵元 4 比特 Element Amplitude，相对最强阵元，刻度 D = 2^(幅度分辨率)（图 6-121）；仅当阵元数为奇数时才有 Reserved。6.4.34 PET Phase IE——每阵元 4 比特 Element Phase，刻度 D = 2^(相位分辨率)，例如 16 个步进、每步 22.5 度（图 6-122）；奇数阵元数时有 Reserved。6.4.35 Sync Frame Frequency IE——5 比特频率（Sync 帧之间的超帧数，0 = 停止）、1 比特方向（全向 vs 定向轮询），依据 6.3.6（图 6-123）。6.4.36 Directional Peer IE——SrcID、DestID、Configuration（Request/Release 比特、Unidirectional/Bidirectional Allowance 比特）以及 Allocated Superframes，用于常规 CAP/S-CAP 中的定向对等链路（图 6-124/6-125）。

blocks.en: The takeaway: these six IEs form a tidy directional-beam toolkit. 6.4.31 and 6.4.32 declare the array shape and resolution; 6.4.33 and 6.4.34 report the measured per-element amplitude and phase against that declared scale; 6.4.35 paces the directional Sync frames; and 6.4.36 negotiates a directional peer link. Read them as one family and the millimetre-wave beam-management story of HR-WPAN snaps into focus.
blocks.zh: 要点：这六个 IE 共同构成了一套清爽的定向波束工具箱。6.4.31 与 6.4.32 声明阵列形状与分辨率；6.4.33 与 6.4.34 依据所声明的刻度上报实测的各阵元幅度与相位；6.4.35 为定向 Sync 帧设定节奏；6.4.36 协商定向对等链路。把它们当作一个家族来读，HR-WPAN 的毫米波波束管理脉络便一目了然。

cites.note: Clause 6.4.31-6.4.36 Information Elements: Beam PET, HRS Beam PET, PET Amplitude, PET Phase, Sync Frame Frequency, Directional Peer (figures 6-117 through 6-125).
